replaceUnsupportedHelp: Replacement is unavailable in export preview or read-only mode; the document title, math formulas, databases, HTML blocks, Mermaid diagrams, and text with complex formatting also cannot be replaced
replaceCurrentUnsupported: This match spans complex formatting or read-only content and cannot be replaced directly
replaceAttributeViewUnsupported: Database results support search and highlight only; replacement is not supported
replaceMermaidUnsupported: Mermaid diagrams support search and highlight only; replacement is not supported
replaceHtmlBlockUnsupported: HTML blocks support search and highlight of rendered text only; replacement is not supported
replaceModeUnsupported: Replacement is unavailable in export preview or read-only mode
replaceAllConfirm: Replace {count} matches in the current document?
replaceProtyleMissing: Cannot find a writable Protyle editor; replace aborted to keep undo available
selectionOnlyNoScope: Selection-only mode is on, but there is no usable selection
settingsRestrictInlineHint: When enabled, search only within the selected inline elements (multi-select). With an empty find box, preview all matching inline elements of the selected types. Limit-find choices reset when the search UI closes
settingsIncludeScopeHint: Controls which block-level types (and inline memos) may be searched
settingsIncludeHtmlBlockHint: Match visible rendered text inside HTML blocks, not the HTML source
settingsIncludeFoldedBlocksHint: Controls whether to search hidden content inside folded blocks (excluding folded headings)
settingsIncludeInlineMemoHint: Matches show a yellow/orange dashed underline under the corresponding text
settingsRestrictInlineMathHint: Match visible rendered formula text (not LaTeX source); not replaceable
settingsRestrictInlineMemoHint: Turn on Include in find → Inline memos first; not replaceable
settingsRestrictInlineMemoOnHint: Turn on Include in find → Inline memos first; not replaceable
